title: Ability to collapse a column through API
excerpt:
We want to collapse a column (e.g. hide) via the API. Does the API support this feature? 
Thanks.

posts.author: sudewa (Sudewa Nawarathna)
posts.cookedHtml:
We want to collapse a column (e.g. hide) via the API. Does the API support this feature?
Thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @sudewa !

Welcome to the Community! I hope you like it here!

If what you are trying to do is hide a column in a board via API so that when someone accesses the board using our UI, they wont see that column, that is not possible as of today. By hiding I mean something like this:

image1348×732 44.7 KB

Please do contact us if you have any more questions!

Cheers,
-Matias
